text:
pkg-message:
"https://docs.kde.org/trunk5/en/extragear-utils/krusader/konfig-dependencies.html
contains a list of programs Krusader optionally looks for."

The url doesn't exist. Maybe the https://github.com/KDE/krusader/blob/master/INSTALL file contains this information, in the "Suggested packages" section.

I think should ship a file which contains these information (or place it into pkg-message).
